basic_details.job_title: NIPER Guwahati Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Guwahati
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Guwahati (NIPER Guwahati) Chief Executive Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website niper.gov.in. Has been announced through the NIPER Guwahati Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate in Life Sciences or Ph.D. in Life Sciences
qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer : Essential: Doctorate in Life Sciences or allied sciences from a recognized University with at least 10 years' experience (excluding the Ph.D. tenure, if any) in at least 2-3 sectors, including Industry, CRO, Technology Business Incubators, Start-ups, Innovation Management, or Academic / Research organizations. Or, Master's Degree in Business Management from a recognized University with 15 years' managerial experience in at least 2-3 sectors including Industry, CRO, Technology Business Incubators, Start-ups, Venture Capital Firms in Technology Sectors, Innovation Management. Experience in articulating incubation policy documents, knowledge of start-up and entrepreneur ecosystem, proactive networking with industry, incubation center, and mentoring for routine operations. Desirable: Ph.D. in Life Sciences/ Allied Areas is preferable. Preference will be given to candidates with experience working at Science and Technology-driven start-up incubators.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIPER Guwahati CEO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the NIPER Guwahati CEO position is 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CEO post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Doctorate in Life Sciences or allied sciences with 10 years of experience, or a Master's Degree in Business Management with 15 years of managerial experience. Experience in the start-up ecosystem is also crucial.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the CEO position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the CEO post is 45 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the CEO role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIPER Guwahati CEO recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official NIPER Guwahati website on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the CEO post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a screening of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the CEO position at NIPER Guwahati is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIPER Guwahati located?
faq.answer: NIPER Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NIPERG/Project-Recrt./2026/05.
